---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[Bug]Title"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Issue Description

A clear description of the problem (e.g. "Texture is missing in crafting terminal", "UI cannot open when clicking the machine")

## Environment Info

- AE-1.20-UI Version: [e.g. v3.5.2]

- Modpack/Mods Used: [e.g. GregTech-Odyssey, Farmers' Delight]

- Other Resource Packs: [list if you are using other resource packs]

## Screenshots/Logs

Attach screenshots of the bug, or game logs if the UI crashes.

## Additional Notes

Any extra information (e.g. this issue only occurs in the dark theme)
